posts.text:
If you have micro data and a small number of choices, multinomial probit is a great option. No IIA/fully flexible covariance matrix with any substitution patterns. Drawback is computational but that’s far less an issue these days.

 It shouldn’t be a dead end. Use it!


Nicholas Decker (@captgouda24)

Today we look at an alternative approach to demand estimation which didn't take off. Why didn't the multivariate probit model have the same impact as random coefficients logit? @Austan_Goolsbee and
